scope: Read-only source and applied-ledger review. No notification event was created, failed, retried, delivered, or changed.
requestedInvariant: A controlled failed notification must prepare for human review only and must not resend automatically.

evidence.dispatcher: Posts transaction_progress_dispatch to the send-email Edge Function.
evidence.claimEligibility: automation_key = transaction_progress_changed; channel = email; status in (queued, failed); dispatch_attempt_count < max_dispatch_attempts; next_dispatch_attempt_at due.
evidence.uiBehaviour: The existing manual resend UI says a queued resend will retry automatically if needed.

risk: Forcing a failure against a real staging recipient could result in automatic re-dispatch by the scheduled worker, contrary to the requested invariant.
requiredForwardChange: Introduce an explicit manual-review state or controlled-test metadata flag that the claim/dispatcher path excludes.
When a controlled notification fails, clear next_dispatch_attempt_at and record a review-required reason rather than leaving it claimable.
Expose a deliberate operator-only retry action; it must create an auditable new attempt rather than automatically retrying the failed event.
Deploy and verify that forward change before creating any safe failed-notification rehearsal.
